text: And you know, I reviewed the bridge, LW post meeting note. I don't think I want to send this to them. The primary reason is I think that I don't want to close them off to optionality. I still think there's a way to do SDLT and this note makes it seem definitive that we're not doing SDLT or not doing the transfer of equity. I still want to keep that open. I like the topics of agenda for the meeting. I think maybe draft an email where we're just confirming that and putting that in the agenda of topics for the workshop or something like that. Drop that. Let me know what you think. Those are my thoughts.
